SEARCH
Package com.govsim.govsim.model

Class Report

java.lang.Object
com.govsim.govsim.model.Report
public class Report extends Object
Monthly performance report for one ministry. Tracks all events, resolved count, and overall rating.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private List<Event>
    events
    All events that occurred this month in this ministry.
    private String
    ministry
    The ministry this report belongs to.
    private int
    month
    The month this report covers (1-12).
    private double
    rating
    Overall performance rating (0.0 - 100.0).
    private int
    year
    The year this report covers.

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Report

      public Report(String ministry, int month, int year)
      Creates a new Report for the given ministry, month, and year.
      Parameters:
      ministry - the ministry name
      month - the report month (1-12)
      year - the report year
